name: OBGM (oral bacterial growth medium) + [U-13C]glycine (PMC3946380)

provenance.citation: Medium composition from PMC3946380 (see GrowthDB record).
provenance.notes: Complex medium: chemically-defined portion mapped to BiGG; biological extracts listed in `unmapped`. Added via GrowthDB curation.
provenance.verification: auto-extracted; O2/carbon verified from paper, full recipe cited from an external reference (manual review)
provenance.verification_note: OBGM is a complex/undefined oral bacterial growth medium. This paper (PMC3946380) USES OBGM but does NOT reproduce its recipe (salts, carbon/N source, buffer, vitamins, trace elements, extracts); it cites external sources (Mitchell et al.; Veith et al.) for the formulation. Full component list therefore cannot be verified from this source and is left for manual review. VERIFIED CORRECTIONS vs curr
